Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Pumpkin Bread

Yield 2 loaves
Preparation time 15m
Cook time 70m
Ingredients
  • 256g all purpose flour, sifted
  • 1/2 tsp. of salt
  • 1 tsp of ground cloves
  • 1 tsp of ground cinnamon
  • 1 tsp of nutmeg
  • 1 tsp of baking soda
  • 1/2 tsp of baking powder
  • 170g unsalted butter, softened
  • 450g white granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs
  • 15 oz / 425g pure pumpkin
Instructions
  1. Preheat oven to 325 F
  2. Whisk dry ingredients together (flour, salt, cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking soda, baking powder)
  3. Cream butter and sugar
  4. Mix in eggs one at a time, until just combined
  5. Mix in pumpkin
  6. On low, mix flour mixture into wet mixture
  7. Add to 8x4 inch bread pans, bake for 65 to 75 minutes
  8. Let bread cool for 10 minutes in pan
